# Coalesce default (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `gx_03_ioc_ip` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Coalesce default. `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`).

```sql
dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip | alter threat_label = coalesce(threat, "unclassified") | comp count() as iocs, count_distinct(threat_label) as distinct_threats
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 1). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
